use_cases: Displaying content in an animated, contained card layout with sub-components
Creating visual diagram showcases with hover animations
Building card-based UI layouts with title, description, and visual sections
Implementing dark mode supported card interfaces
ai_summary: A composite animated card component featuring modular sub-components (CardBody, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardVisual) for building flexible card-based interfaces. Supports dark mode, hover animations via Tailwind group utilities, and inherits border/shadow styling from shadcn/ui design patterns. Ideal for creating interactive card layouts with visual emphasis and content hierarchy.
